hook.text: RASHFORD SUITORS CIRCLE AS AL HILAL LEAD CHASE

beats.text: UNITED ARE INVITING AGENTS TO BRING OFFERS FOR RASHFORD
AL HILAL HAVE MADE HIM THEIR MAIN SUMMER TARGET
ARSENAL ARE ALSO AWARE OF HIS AVAILABILITY

caption: The Rashford exit door is opening 🔴 After his loan at Barcelona expired and he scored against Croatia at the World Cup, United are now actively inviting agents to bring offers for Marcus Rashford. Al Hilal are pushing hard and have made him their main summer target — while Arsenal and other Premier League sides have been alerted. The £40m release clause is available to almost any buyer except Liverpool and Man City. This saga is moving fast. Where do you see Rashford next season? 👇 REPORTED — per ESPN / Football365. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow #rashford
